name: EduGrade AI
description: AI-assisted university course grading assistant integrating Gemini and Gmail: offline batch grading, docx/ipynb support, submission tracking, accumulated weighted scoring, AI exam generation with Word export, and classroom tools.
description_zh: 整合 Gemini AI 與 Gmail 的大學課程評分助理：離線批次評分、Word/Notebook 評分、繳交追蹤、累計加權成績、依講義 AI 出題並匯出 Word，以及課堂抽籤點名工具。
author: Juihung Liu (劉瑞弘) · NCUT 智慧自動化工程系
